---
title: "test_deep_memory_purge_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_deep_memory_purge_empire.py"
loc: 19
complexity: 3
logic_score: 6.60
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.63
---

## Intent
The `test_deep_memory_purge_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestDeepMemoryPurgeEmpire, test_teardown_and_collection. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestDeepMemoryPurgeEmpire, test_teardown_and_collection. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [gc](file://gc)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.sv_engine](file://src.core.sv_engine)

### Exports
- `TestDeepMemoryPurgeEmpire`
- `test_teardown_and_collection`
